历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics/Science category were 3973 → 5966 → 3726 → 3293 → 3917, showing a fluctuating trend. Rankings shifted back by about 2000 positions from 2021 to 2022, moved forward significantly from 2023 to 2024, and slightly shifted back to 3917 in 2025, with large fluctuations over the past 5 years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 3917. The university's enrollment plan for Physics/Science in Anhui: 237 in 2021, 227 in 2022, 232 in 2023, 236 in 2024, 231 in 2025, and 217 in 2026. The 2026 plan reduces by 14 students (about -6.1%) compared to 2025, which is a significant reduction, theoretically easing competition slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: University of Electronic Science and Technology of China is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Ranking, it ranks 33rd, with stable rankings in the 28-33 range in recent years, belonging to top domestic science and engineering universities. The 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative, involving a student birthday red envelope hardship identification incident and an associate professor's inappropriate remarks incident, which may mildly suppress application psychology. Douyin popularity ranks 33rd (relatively hot), with high short video exposure, reflecting considerable social attention. Historical admission anomaly records are neutral. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation: Electronic Science and Technology A+, Information and Communication Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Instrument Science and Technology A-, Optical Engineering A-, Management Science and Engineering A-, totaling 6 A- and above disciplines, with top national strength in the electronic information field.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electronic Information/Communication majors were highly recommended in 2024, Computer majors recommended (67.8), Electrical Engineering and Automation highly recommended (74.28), related major categories continue to heat up. The estimated number of Physics Category examinees in Anhui for 2026 is about 313,000, slightly decreasing from 321,000 in 2025, slightly easing competition pressure. University of Electronic Science and Technology of China is located in Chengdu, Sichuan, not a local university, but has a large enrollment scale in Anhui (over 200 in Physics Category), making it a key cross-province enrollment province. The university's enrollment proportion in Sichuan is about 20%, and in Anhui about 5%-6%, which is a medium-to-high cross-province enrollment scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 3917, a 6% reduction in Physics Category enrollment in 2026, a slight decrease in Anhui Physics examinees, slightly negative university reputation but high major popularity and strong discipline strength, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly move forward (easier to enter) compared to 2025, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 3755, and a range of 3255-4255.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 3255-4255, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors (Yingcai Class, Dual Degree Experimental Class) as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety. If the ranking is near the upper limit (around 4255), prioritize Tier 3 majors, while also considering lower-ranked Tier 2 majors. University of Electronic Science and Technology of China has electronic information as its core advantage, so it is recommended to prioritize majors related to electronics, communication, and computer science.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category/Liberal Arts were 1380 → 1238 → 1617 → 1451 → 1375, fluctuating within the range of 1200-1620. There was a slight forward shift in 2021-2022, a significant backward shift to 1617 in 2023, and a forward shift back to 1375 in 2024-2025. The fluctuation range in the past three years is about 240 places, with a baseline ranking of approximately 1375 in 2025. The enrollment plan for History Category/Liberal Arts in Anhui Province: 10 students in 2021, 10 in 2022, 10 in 2023, 5 in 2024, 6 in 2025, and 6 in 2026. The 2026 plan is the same as 2025, with no expansion or contraction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: University of Electronic Science and Technology of China is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. It ranks 33rd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, making it a top domestic science and engineering university, but its liberal arts programs are not its traditional strengths. The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving student management incidents and teacher ethics incidents, which may slightly suppress application psychology. Its Douyin popularity ranks 33rd (relatively hot), but the hot content mainly focuses on science and engineering programs, with limited impact on liberal arts applications. Its advantageous science and engineering disciplines (Electronics A+, Communications A+, Computer Science A) do not directly boost liberal arts program applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Program Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The History Category mainly enrolls in Foreign Language and Literature and Social Science Experimental Class. Foreign language programs have generally lukewarm social popularity, while social science programs have polarized popularity. In 2026, the estimated number of History Category examinees in Anhui Province is about 138,000, a slight decrease from 141,000 in 2025, slightly easing competition. The university is located in Chengdu, Sichuan, not a local university in Anhui. It only enrolls 6 students in History Category in Anhui, a very small enrollment size, making rankings easily affected by individual candidates' volunteer choices.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1375, the unchanged 2026 History Category enrollment plan, the slight decrease in Anhui History Category examinees, the somewhat negative but limited impact of university reputation, and the fact that liberal arts programs are not the university's strength, it is predicted that the 2026 minimum admission ranking will be roughly the same as 2025 but slightly backward. The predicted minimum ranking is about 1390, with a range of 1182-1598.

Since liberal arts programs are not the university's strength, it is advisable to consider other comprehensive universities' liberal arts programs when applying.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for the medical category (Clinical Medicine) at the University of Electronic Science and Technology of China in Anhui Province from 2022 to 2025 were 7443, 7722, 8082, and 8426 respectively, showing a steady upward trend year by year, reflecting the continuously intensifying competition for this medical program in Anhui. In terms of enrollment plan, 12 students were planned in 2022, expanded to 13 in 2023, and maintained at 13 in 2024 and 2025. The 2026 enrollment plan remains at 13, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction, but the upward momentum in rankings persists.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: The University of Electronic Science and Technology of China is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, a key construction university under the national '985 Project' and '211 Project', and is included in the 'Double First-Class' construction university list. The university is characterized by electronic information technology, with outstanding engineering strength. Although its medical category (Clinical Medicine) is not a traditional strong medical program, it still has strong appeal to candidates due to the overall platform advantages and the 985 brand effect.

专业热度与地域.title: Program Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the popularity of the Clinical Medicine program has been rising nationwide. The enrollment scale for medical categories in Anhui Province is relatively limited, leading to fierce competition. The Clinical Medicine program (Shahe Campus) at the University of Electronic Science and Technology of China offers only one major in Anhui with a small enrollment number (13), and its scarcity further raises the admission threshold. The university is located in Chengdu, which has good regional appeal and exerts a certain influence on Anhui candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous upward trend in historical rankings and the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for the medical category (Clinical Medicine) at the University of Electronic Science and Technology of China in 2026 will be approximately 8476, a slight increase of 50 places compared to 2025. The fluctuation range is expected to be between 8306 and 8646. Candidates are advised to plan their volunteer applications reasonably within this range.

Candidates with rankings within the predicted range (8306-8646) can actively apply. _translation.university_name_en: University of Electronic Science and Technology of China
